inputs.prompt: Newsletter: The Craft. Description: Weekly newsletter about the business of writing — freelance rates, contract red flags, negotiation tactics, who is hiring. Audience: Freelance writers and journalists. Cadence: Weekly, Tuesday mornings. Tone: Direct, practical, slightly cynical. Subscribers: 4,200. Open rate: 52%. Testimonial: 'The Craft saved me from signing a contract that would have given away all my rights. Worth subscribing for the contract red flags alone.' — freelance journalist.
Newsletter: Daily Science Brief. Description: One science story per day in under 500 words. Cadence: Daily. Tone: Clear, enthusiastic.

Newsletter: European Housing Watch. Description: Fortnightly analysis of housing policy across EU member states. Audience: Policy professionals, journalists, housing advocates across Europe. Cadence: Every two weeks, Mondays. Tone: Analytical, evidence-based. Subscribers: 7,800. Open rate: 48%. Testimonial: 'The only newsletter that covers European housing policy with the depth and cross-border perspective I need for my work.' — senior policy advisor, European Commission.
